title: Garlicky Gooey Festive Gelatin Crumble
description: A keto-friendly and festive Argentinean dish featuring unflavored gelatin that combines creamy texture with garlic for a memorable snack or dessert.
instructions: Chop the gelatin into small pieces.
In a mixing bowl, combine the chopped gelatin with heavy cream. Stir until fully dissolved and smooth.
Add in the softened cream cheese, butter, garlic powder, and salt to the bowl. Mix well until you achieve a creamy consistency.
Transfer the mixture into a baking dish or mold that can go in an oven safe container.
Bake at 300°F (150°C) for about 25-30 minutes or until golden brown on top and set to your preference. Ensure not to overcook to maintain gooeyness.
Remove from the oven, let cool slightly before serving.
